problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
